lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant scratches, dents, and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear and damage to the upholstery. Several mechanical systems require repair or replacement, and the engine is not running smoothly. Sold as-is.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage, including large dents and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear with tears in the upholstery and persistent staining. Multiple mechanical systems require major repairs or are currently non-functional.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained since day one. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches or dents, and the interior is spotless, retaining its original look and feel. Mechanically, the car is perfect; the engine starts instantly and runs quietly, while the transmission shifts seamlessly through all gears. Every feature, from the electronics to the climate control, functions exactly as intended. This is an exceptional opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives like it is brand new.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project seekers! This vehicle is the perfect 'mechanic’s special' for someone looking for a rewarding restoration project. While it currently requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it offers a fantastic, low-cost entry point for anyone handy with a wrench. Grab this bargain and bring it back to its former glory!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver. The exterior shows typical wear for its age, including some clear coat oxidation on the roof and a few minor dings along the side panels. Inside, the cabin is clean, though there is a small tear in the driver's seat upholstery and the radio display is slightly dimmed. Mechanically, the car runs and shifts smoothly, though the next owner should plan for a brake service in the near future. It is a solid, functional vehicle that has been well-maintained despite its cosmetic imperfections.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model delivers reliable performance and sophisticated comfort. Our dealership ensures each unit meets rigorous standards for quality and roadworthiness. Secure a high-caliber driving experience with this exceptional addition to our inventory.

Hey there! I'm looking for a new home for my trusty car! It’s been super reliable and is still in wonderful shape for its next owner. It drives beautifully and has been really well-maintained over the years. You're going to love how it handles on the road—it's perfect for your next adventure!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure VANOS system recently overhauled for precision timing. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission pairs with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal torque distribution. Structural integrity is prioritized with a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed suspension bushings. While the finish shows minor road-going patina, the mechanical components—including the cross-drilled rotors and Bilstein dampers—are dialed in for immediate feedback and high-revving performance.
Used car. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean interior. Title in hand.

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering high-revving linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The chassis remains composed thanks to an overhauled suspension with Bilstein dampers and refreshed poly-bushings. Crucially, the rear subframe has been reinforced—a vital preventative measure for this platform. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox offers crisp engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical vitals are robust, with a recent VANOS service and valve adjustment completed. A visceral, analog driving experience for the true enthusiast.
